title: prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. malayana
intro: Prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. malayana, also known as the Malayana prismatomeris, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of the Malayana prismatomeris include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant involve making teas, infusions, and decoctions from its leaves and roots, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
